parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 900, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'You are a STRICT classifier for a volleyball-club lead database, target country "' + ($json.country||'') + '". For EACH candidate website decide whether it is the OFFICIAL website of a SINGLE, REAL volleyball CLUB (fields volleyball teams / runs training / has membership). Answer "no" for: a national or regional FEDERATION/association, a league/cup/competition/results/stats/ranking site, news/magazine/blog, a shop, a directory/aggregator/portal that lists many clubs, a school or university without its own club, a generic sports-hall/arena/municipality page, an events or ticketing page, or anything ambiguous. Be conservative: when unsure, answer "no". It is better to drop a real club than to admit a non-club. Candidates: ' + JSON.stringify(($json.candidates||[]).map(c=>({host:c.host,title:c.title,site_name:c.ogSite,h1:c.h1,excerpt:c.excerpt}))) + '. Respond ONLY with compact JSON {"results":[{"host":string,"is_club":"yes"|"no","name":string,"city":string,"reason":string}]}: name = the club own cleaned name, city = its city if shown else "". Include every host exactly once. No prose, no code fences.' } ] }) }}
